2605.07711.title: SimCT: Recovering Lost Supervision for Cross-Tokenizer On-Policy Distillation
2605.07711.paper_summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) is a standard tool for transferring teacher behavior to a smaller student, but it implicitly assumes that teacher and student predictions are comparable token by token, an assumption that fails whenever the two models tokenize the same text differently. Under heterogeneous tokenizers, exact shared-token matching silently discards a large fraction of the teacher signal at precisely the positions where vocabularies disagree. We propose \textbf{\underline{Sim}ple \underline{C}ross-\underline{T}okenizer OPD (SimCT)}, which restores this signal by enlarging the supervision space: alongside shared tokens, SimCT compares teacher and student over short multi-token continuations that both tokenizers can realize, leaving the OPD loss form itself unchanged. We show that these units are the finest jointly tokenizable supervision interface, and that coarser alternatives remove teacher-student distinctions that are useful for on-policy learning. Across three heterogeneous teacher-student pairs on mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, SimCT shows consistent gains over shared-vocabulary OPD and representative cross-tokenizer baselines, with ablations confirming that the improvements come from recovering supervision discarded by exact shared-token matching. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}.
2605.07711.paper_summary_zh: 在政策蒸餾（OPD）中，這是一種將教師行為轉移到較小學生的標準工具，但它隱含地假設教師和學生的預測是逐個標記可比的，這一假設在兩個模型以不同方式對同一文本進行標記時會失效。在異質標記器下，精確的共享標記匹配在詞彙不一致的精確位置靜默地丟棄了大量的教師信號。我們提出了\textbf{\underline{Sim}ple \underline{C}ross-\underline{T}okenizer OPD (SimCT)}，它通過擴大監督空間來恢復這一信號：除了共享標記外，SimCT還比較教師和學生在兩個標記器都能實現的短多標記延續上，保持OPD損失形式不變。我們表明這些單元是最精細的聯合可標記監督介面，而粗糙的替代方案則移除了對於政策學習有用的教師-學生區別。在數學推理和代碼生成基準上的三對異質教師-學生中，SimCT在共享詞彙OPD和代表性跨標記器基準上顯示出一致的增益，消融實驗確認這些改進來自於恢復被精確共享標記匹配丟棄的監督。代碼可在\href{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}{https://github.com/sunjie279/SimCT-}上獲得。
2605.07711.author: Jie Sun et.al.
2605.07711.authors: Jie Sun, Mao Zheng, Mingyang Song, Qiyong Zhong, Yilin Cheng, Bichuan Feng, Pengfei Liu, Junfeng Fang, Xiang Wang
